text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates to members of congress, which must include the words “U.S. Congress.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(12), eff. January 1, 2012.

(c) The license plates remain valid until December 31 of each year.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.402 — Members of Congress

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates to members of congress, which must include the words “U.S. Congress.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296, Sec. 247(12), eff. January 1, 2012.

(c) The license plates remain valid until December 31 of each year.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 247(12), eff. January 1, 2012.*
